title: lepachys pinnata
intro: Lepachys pinnata is a plant species belonging to the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as the Indian snake root or milk vine. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Lepachys pinnata include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. Lepachys pinnata is often prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, asthma, and eczema.
